_comment: Local dev overrides. Copy to dart_defines.json (gitignored) and fill in. Build/run with: flutter run --dart-define-from-file=dart_defines.json. For white-label production builds, use the shared brand config at the repo root instead: flutter build apk --release --dart-define-from-file=../brand.json (brand.json carries the BRAND_* keys below plus API_BASE_URL).
BRAND_TAGLINE: Sign in to manage your service
